commit_message:
Merge branch 'schwarz-fix-spookyhash_sv_testbench' into 'devel'

Fix test of SystemVerilog implementation of SpookyHash, correct headers

See merge request ndk/ndk-fpga!332

examples.commit_message:
Merge branch 'schwarz-fix-spookyhash_sv_testbench' into 'devel'

Fix test of SystemVerilog implementation of SpookyHash, correct headers

See merge request ndk/ndk-fpga!332
examples.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 /*!
  * \file spookyhash.sv
- * \brief Test for SystemVerilog implementation of short version of SpookyHash non-cryptographic hash function.
+ * \brief SystemVerilog implementation of short version of SpookyHash non-cryptographic hash function.
  * \author Ondrej Schwarz <ondrejschwarz@cesnet.cz>
  * \date 2025

examples.commit_message:
Merge branch 'schwarz-fix-spookyhash_sv_testbench' into 'devel'

Fix test of SystemVerilog implementation of SpookyHash, correct headers

See merge request ndk/ndk-fpga!332
examples.patch:
@@ -11,35 +11,44 @@
 
 TOP_LEVEL=testbench
 TESTBENCH=testbench.sv
-MTI_HOME=/usr/local/fpga/modelsim/2024.1/questasim
+MTI_HOME=$(dir $(shell which vsim))..
+HASH_NAME=spookyhash
+CPP=../../sw/SpookyV2.cpp
+CEXTERN=${HASH_NAME}_cextern
+DPI=${HASH_NAME}_dpi.h
+
 CC=g++
 CFLAGS=-shared -fPIC -I. -I${MTI_HOME}/include -I../../sw
 SVC=vlog
 SVC_FLAGS=-sv
 SIM=vsim
-SIM_FLAGS=-c -sv_lib spooky_cextern -do "run -all; quit"
+SIM_FLAGS=-c -sv_lib ${CEXTERN} -do "run -all; quit"
 
 KEY_WIDTH=40 # passed to testbench.sv package
 
-all: testbench spooky_cextern.so
+all: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so
 
-run: testbench spooky_cextern.so
-	$(SIM) $(SIM_FLAGS) $(TOP_LEVEL)
+run: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so
+	${SIM} ${SIM_FLAGS} ${TOP_LEVEL}
 
-test: testbench spooky_cextern.so test.py
-	pytest test.py
+test: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so test.py
+	python3 -m venv test_venv; \
+	. test_venv/bin/activate;  \
+	pip install pytest;        \
+	pytest test.py;            \
+	rm -fr test_venv
 
-testbench: $(TESTBENCH) spookyhash
-	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) $< +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}
+${TOP_LEVEL}: ${TESTBENCH} ${HASH_NAME}
+	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} $< +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}
 
-spookyhash: ../spookyhash.sv
-	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) $^
+${HASH_NAME}: ../${HASH_NAME}.sv
+	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} $^
 
-spooky_cextern.so: spooky_cextern.cpp ../../sw/SpookyV2.cpp spooky_dpi.h
+${CEXTERN}.so: ${CEXTERN}.cpp ${CPP} ${DPI}
 	${CC} ${CFLAGS} $^ -o $@
 
-spooky_dpi.h: $(TESTBENCH)
-	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) -dpiheader spooky_dpi.h $(TESTBENCH) +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}
+${DPI}: ${TESTBENCH}
+	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} -dpiheader ${DPI} ${TESTBENCH} +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}
 
 clean:
-	@rm -r spooky_cextern.so spooky_dpi.h transcript work test_logs __pycache__
+	@rm -r ${CEXTERN}.so ${DPI} transcript work test_logs __pycache__
examples.before_code:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# Copyright (C) 2025 CESNET z. s. p. o.
# Author(s): Ondrej Schwarz <ondrejschwarz@cesnet.cz>

# Makefile for running test SystemVerilog implementation
# of spookyhash in spookyhash.sv

# 'make' buils all necessary files.
# 'make run' builds all necessary files and runs simulation of testbench.sv with the specified key width.
# 'make test' runs pytest test executing the simulation for key lengths ranging from 1B to 191B.

TOP_LEVEL=testbench
TESTBENCH=testbench.sv
MTI_HOME=/usr/local/fpga/modelsim/2024.1/questasim
CC=g++
CFLAGS=-shared -fPIC -I. -I${MTI_HOME}/include -I../../sw
SVC=vlog
SVC_FLAGS=-sv
SIM=vsim
SIM_FLAGS=-c -sv_lib spooky_cextern -do "run -all; quit"

KEY_WIDTH=40 # passed to testbench.sv package

all: testbench spooky_cextern.so

run: testbench spooky_cextern.so
	$(SIM) $(SIM_FLAGS) $(TOP_LEVEL)

test: testbench spooky_cextern.so test.py
	pytest test.py

testbench: $(TESTBENCH) spookyhash
	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) $< +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}

spookyhash: ../spookyhash.sv
	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) $^

spooky_cextern.so: spooky_cextern.cpp ../../sw/SpookyV2.cpp spooky_dpi.h
	${CC} ${CFLAGS} $^ -o $@

spooky_dpi.h: $(TESTBENCH)
	$(SVC) $(SVC_FLAGS) -dpiheader spooky_dpi.h $(TESTBENCH) +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}

clean:
	@rm -r spooky_cextern.so spooky_dpi.h transcript work test_logs __pycache__
examples.after_code:
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
# Copyright (C) 2025 CESNET z. s. p. o.
# Author(s): Ondrej Schwarz <ondrejschwarz@cesnet.cz>

# Makefile for running test SystemVerilog implementation
# of spookyhash in spookyhash.sv

# 'make' buils all necessary files.
# 'make run' builds all necessary files and runs simulation of testbench.sv with the specified key width.
# 'make test' runs pytest test executing the simulation for key lengths ranging from 1B to 191B.

TOP_LEVEL=testbench
TESTBENCH=testbench.sv
MTI_HOME=$(dir $(shell which vsim))..
HASH_NAME=spookyhash
CPP=../../sw/SpookyV2.cpp
CEXTERN=${HASH_NAME}_cextern
DPI=${HASH_NAME}_dpi.h

CC=g++
CFLAGS=-shared -fPIC -I. -I${MTI_HOME}/include -I../../sw
SVC=vlog
SVC_FLAGS=-sv
SIM=vsim
SIM_FLAGS=-c -sv_lib ${CEXTERN} -do "run -all; quit"

KEY_WIDTH=40 # passed to testbench.sv package

all: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so

run: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so
	${SIM} ${SIM_FLAGS} ${TOP_LEVEL}

test: ${TOP_LEVEL} ${CEXTERN}.so test.py
	python3 -m venv test_venv; \
	. test_venv/bin/activate;  \
	pip install pytest;        \
	pytest test.py;            \
	rm -fr test_venv

${TOP_LEVEL}: ${TESTBENCH} ${HASH_NAME}
	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} $< +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}

${HASH_NAME}: ../${HASH_NAME}.sv
	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} $^

${CEXTERN}.so: ${CEXTERN}.cpp ${CPP} ${DPI}
	${CC} ${CFLAGS} $^ -o $@

${DPI}: ${TESTBENCH}
	${SVC} ${SVC_FLAGS} -dpiheader ${DPI} ${TESTBENCH} +define+KEY_WIDTH=${KEY_WIDTH}

clean:
	@rm -r ${CEXTERN}.so ${DPI} transcript work test_logs __pycache__
